name: mq-sentinel
description: Production-grade, read-only IBM MQ diagnostic MCP server for AI agents. Returns Root Cause + Recommended Fix Steps + verified IBM Knowledge Center citations. Built with strong security, OIDC+RBAC, hash-chained audit, and full org-readiness artifacts.

tools.name: diagnose_failed_channels
tools.description: Channel state + AMQERR analysis (2035, 2009, 2059, INDOUBT, AMQ9202/9208/9503).

tools.name: analyze_dlq_and_suggest_reprocessing
tools.description: Dead-letter queue inspection (HEADERS ONLY — bodies never read).

tools.name: check_cluster_health
tools.description: Partial repos, stale CLUSQMGR, suspended members, unhealthy cluster channels.

tools.name: diagnose_native_ha_issues
tools.description: Replica state, quorum, log replay lag, CRR.

tools.name: diagnose_rdqm_issues
tools.description: Pacemaker quorum, DRBD per-peer state, split-brain.

tools.name: diagnose_zos_qsg_issues
tools.description: QSG members, CHIN, page sets, buffer pools, CF structures.

tools.name: diagnose_multi_instance_issues
tools.description: Active/standby state, dual-active split, failover events.

tools.name: full_mq_health_check
tools.description: Composite: channels + DLQ + cluster, ranked by severity.

http.note: Public read-only demo — sandboxed fixture QMs only. Self-host for your own QMs.
